raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint involves my CITI BANK Dividend Card.My XXXX, XXXX statement showed a number of fraudulent charges. I immediately notified their fraud department. I paid all charges that were legitimately mine. They issued me a new credit card. 

My XXXX statement continued to included one of the 6 or so previous, fraudulent charges. It had not been deleted. I called again, and was told that CITI was aware of their error and I should pay only the charges that were ( again ) legitimately mine. I did that & asked that I be sent a letter - or email- as proof that their error had been deleted from my account. I asked for names & phone numbers, and spoke with a " supervisor ''. Nothing ever came. 

My XXXX statement included the same charge, ( over {$700.00}. ) plus interest! I called again, and was told again to pay only my charges. AGAIN I protested, and asked for a NEW STATEMENT. Which they promised, along with admissions of of ongoing error. They said it would take 5-10 business days for their correction to show on my account Today, XX/XX/XXXX, my XXXX statement arrived with the same, fraudulent charge from XX/XX/XXXX, plus more interest charges. PLEASE HELP! 

XXXX XXXX
